mapping.a_element: conformally invariant curves (iso-height lines on WO3 surface) described by Schramm-Loewner evolution (SLE_κ)
mapping.b_element: percolation cluster boundaries in critical site percolation on the triangular grid, which are also known to be described by SLE_κ

mapping.a_element: diffusivity parameter κ ∼ 3 for SLE curves
mapping.b_element: SLE_κ with κ = 6 for critical percolation cluster boundaries

mapping.a_element: domain walls in the critical Ising model (κ = 3)
mapping.b_element: percolation cluster boundaries in critical site percolation (κ = 6)

mapping.a_element: conformal invariance of iso-height lines on WO3 surface
mapping.b_element: conformal invariance of percolation cluster boundaries in the unit disk

brief_justification: Both papers involve conformally invariant curves described by Schramm-Loewner evolution (SLE_κ), with the WO3 surface iso-height lines and percolation cluster boundaries playing analogous roles. While the specific κ values differ (κ ∼ 3 for Ising-like domain walls vs. κ = 6 for percolation), the underlying SLE machinery and conformal invariance are shared.
